filesystem.description: Read, write, list, search, and inspect files in the local project directory.

github.description: Manage issues, pull requests, comments, and file content from remote GitHub repositories.

postgres.description: Execute read queries against the development PostgreSQL database to verify schema state and inspect data.

deep-research.description: Perform multi-step web searches (DuckDuckGo + Semantic Scholar) and synthesize findings into structured reports.

memory.description: Store and retrieve semantic embeddings of code snippets and architectural decisions for long-term project memory.
